Package com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.main.monster

Class AbstractMonster

java.lang.Object
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.main.monster.AbstractMonster
All Implemented Interfaces:
HasClient, HasSfsData, Positioned, ReadableMonster
Direct Known Subclasses:
Monster, UnownedMonster
public abstract class AbstractMonster extends Object implements ReadableMonster, HasClient
